bead.title: Stage 4.6: Beads mutations — create + claim/unclaim + update
bead.description: Create src/lib/components/BeadForm.svelte for create/update. Claim/unclaim buttons in BeadDetail. Uses Houdini mutation .gql files for each. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 4 bead #40.
bead.acceptance: (1) MANUAL: click 'New bead', fill the form, submit — the bead appears in the list and is verifiable via `ddx bead show`. (2) Click Claim in detail panel, status changes visibly AND in `ddx bead show`. (3) Same for Unclaim. (4) Edit a field via update form, verify persisted.
